prompt: For our R-Ladies chapter banner I want to rotate the R in the logo a bit and swap the font to Montserrat to make it pop. Is that okay, and what am I actually allowed to customise on the logo?
assertions: Says do NOT rotate, skew, stretch, or change the logo's proportions
Says do NOT move the R icon relative to its text
Says do NOT recreate the logo in a different font (so Montserrat is not allowed)
Says the R and + submark CAN be filled with images or brand colours
Notes any customised parts must contrast enough with their background
Points to the Canva/Affinity guidance for how to customise the submark
